event: The Investiture of Harold as Duke of Franconia
description: A grand Baroque ceiling fresco viewed from below, set within an elaborate architectural framework of gilded stucco ornament, scrollwork, and trompe-l'oeil columns. The painted scene depicts a formal investiture ceremony with robed figures on a raised platform or steps before an architectural backdrop with draped curtains. Multiple figures in ceremonial garments gather around a central figure receiving honors. The ornate Rococo frame with gold leaf and sculptural elements integrates seamlessly with the painted scene, typical of Tiepolo's illusionistic ceiling decorations.

_meta.title: The Investiture of Herold as Duke of Franconia
